name: Melee
description: *Melee* **Actions**  typically target only adjacent characters.

name: Ranged
description: **Effect:** *Ranged* actions are affected by cover and have **+1 Disadvantage** against adjacent characters.

name: Spell
description: *Spell* actions are magical in nature.

name: Weapon
description: **Effect:** *Weapon* **Actions** require an active *Stance* with the *Weapon* tag.*Ranged Weapon* **Actions** require an active *Stance* with the *Ranged Weapon* tag.

name: Shield
description: **Effect:** *Shield* actions require a **Stance** with the *Shield* tag.

name: Stance
description: *Stances* affect the types of actions your character can perform. You have all benefits of an active *Stance.*

name: Special
description: *Special* actions typically have unique restrictions or are granted by other actions.

name: Heroic
description: Under construction.

name: Aura
description: **Effect:** Your *Aura* affects a **Size 1 Area** centered on you.

name: Movement
description: **Effect:** You can't perform *Movement* **Actions** while **Immobilized**.

name: Charged
description: **Effect:** You can only peform a *Charged* **Action** while it has a charge; it loses its charge when used.

name: Support
description: *Support* **Actions** typically assist other characters.

name: Reaction
description: *Reactions* are typically performed on another character's turn.

name: Attack
description: **Effect:** *Attack* **Actions** require an **Attack Roll**.

name: Summon
description: *Summon* **Actions** typically summon characters under your control.

name: Legendary
description: **Effect:** You can't control more than one *Legendary Summon.*

name: Passive
description: *Passive* abilities have ongoing effects.

name: Stealth
description: *Stealth* **Actions** typically confer **Concealment**.

name: Combo
description: **Effect:** When you perform a *Combo* **Action**, until the end of your next turn, your next *Finisher* **Action** benefits from **Finisher** effects.

name: Finisher
description: **Effect:** This **Action** has additional *Finisher* properties if you performed a *Combo* **Action** since your last turn.

name: Trap
description: **Effect:** A *Trap* modifies a tile. Once armed, a *Trap* is *Triggered* when a character becomes adjacent during *Movement*.

name: 1/Round
description: **Effect:** Perform this **Action** only once per round, refreshing at the start of your second turn and on each of your subsequent turns. *Passive* and other special abilities with this property trigger or take effect no more than once per round.

name: 1/Encounter
description: **Effect:** **Actions** with this property can be performed only once per encounter. *Passive* and other special abilities with this property can only be used, trigger, or take effect once per encounter.

name: Bound
description: Bound Passives modify other Actions.

name: Ultimate
description: A character's ultimate ability.

name: Accurate
description: Accurate

name: Inaccurate
description: Inaccurate

name: 1/Turn
description: **Effect:** You can't perform this ability more than once during any character's turn; this ability can't take effect more than once per turn.

name: Battered
description: **Effect:** This ability can only be performed (or this passive only takes effect) while at half of your maximum HP or lower.
